channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Delayed antibiotic initiation linked to worse outcomes in skin infections
item.description: Delayed antibiotic therapy in hospitalized SSTI patients was strongly associated with treatment failure and longer hospital stays.

item.title: Study identifies biomarker to improve diagnosis of rare brain and eye cancers
item.description: A new study found that HAVCR1 could help diagnose rare but aggressive cancers of the brain, spinal cord, and eyes.

item.title: Primary care, bloodletting, and what medicine got right [PODCAST]
item.description: Subscribe to The Podcast by KevinMD. Watch on YouTube. Catch up on old episodes! Robert C. Smith discusses how medicine lost its way.

item.title: Sunscreen confusion increases melanoma risk for Americans
item.description: Melanoma, the most serious skin cancer, does not only occur at the beach or in tanning booths.
